Description

This Anime Gun Combat Animation Pack offers stylized, dynamic gunplay with dual and single handguns — all designed in anime-style combat that will bring energy, action, and flair to your game. With a wide variety of combat movements such as shooting while jumping, sliding, dodging, and combo shots, this pack includes 40+ animations perfect for fast-paced action, futuristic shooters, and anime-inspired battle sequences. This pack includes sample gun models for reference, and you need to socket your own gun on hand_r for compatibility. All animations were created in Autodesk Maya and optimized for smooth integration into 


Included Animations:

The pack includes a wide range of Gun Combat (GC) and Dual Gun Combat (DGC) animations in both Root Motion (RM) and in-place versions. These animations cover every aspect of a character's movement in dynamic gun battles.

Core Animations Include:

    Idle & Loop: Smooth idle poses and looping animations for constant combat.

    Walk, Run, Slide, Roll: Stylish movement for ground-based combat.

    Dodge & Charge: Swift dodges and powerful charged shots for action-packed sequences.

    Combo & Ultimate Skills: Perform jaw-dropping, anime-inspired combo moves and ultimate attacks.

    Shoot While Moving: Shoot during walk, slide, and dodge.

    Jump, Swirl, Knee Strike, Backshot: Perform aerial shoot, flashy swirl shots, and tactical knee shots with creative flair.

    Shoot Charge & Fire: Precision charge shooting and dynamic firing moments.

    Shoot Back & Combo Sequences: Unique moves like shoot-while-backpedaling and enhanced combo moves.

Key Features:

    Total of 40+ High-Quality Animations

    Root Motion (RM) and In-place Versions for flexible usage in game engines

    Dual Handgun (DGC) & Single Gun Combat (GC) styles

    Super-Charged Ultimate Skill Animations for cinematic finishers

    Combat Variety with dodges, rolls, aerial shoots, combos, and more

    Anime-style Dynamic Poses that bring energy and life to your combat scenes

    Works in Unreal Engine & Unity: Ready for plug-and-play integration

    Easy Customization: Animations can be adapted and modified for your characters

Gun Combat Animations (Single Handgun - GC_):

GC_Idle

GC_Idle_Loop

GC_Walk

GC_Run

GC_Dodge_Step

GC_Shoot_Idle

GC_Shoot_Run

GC_Shoot_Walk

GC_Shoot_Combo_1

GC_Shoot_Combo_2

GC_Shoot_Combo_3

GC_Jump_Shoot

GC_Jump_Style_Spin

GC_Roll_Shoot

GC_Backshot

GC_Knee_Shot

GC_Slide_Shoot

GC_Shoot_Charge_Enter

GC_Shoot_Charge_Loop

GC_Shoot_Charge_Fire

GC_Ultimate_Skill

Dual Gun Combat Animations (Dual Handgun - DGC_):

DGC_Idle

DGC_Idle_Loop

DGC_Run

DGC_Dodge_Step

DGC_Shoot_Idle

DGC_Shoot_Run

DGC_Shoot_Walk

DGC_Shoot_Back

DGC_Shoot_Combo_1

DGC_Shoot_Combo_2

DGC_Shoot_Swirl

DGC_Slide_Shoot

DGC_Jump_Shoot

DGC_Jump_Style_Twist

DGC_Roll_Shoot

DGC_Shoot_Charge_Enter

DGC_Shoot_Charge_Loop

DGC_Shoot_Charge_Fire

DGC_Ultimate_Skill
